name: USP消音版 | 闪回
descriptionEn: A fan favorite from Counter-Strike Source, the Silenced USP Pistol has a detachable silencer that gives shots less recoil while suppressing attention-getting noise. It has been hand painted in an attempt to make a suggestion about the duality of man. Sierra Hotel Hotel Hotel
descriptionZh: 从《反恐精英：起源》中穿越而来，是玩家们的最爱，消音版 USP 手枪装有一个可拆卸的消音器，降低后坐力的同时还能抑制住容易引起注意的枪声。 这把武器进行了手绘，试图暗示男人的二元性。 十分精通，驾轻就熟
